{{infobox football tournament season
|title           = Copa do Brasil
|year            = 1995
|other_titles    = Copa do Brasil 1995
|image           =
|image_size       = 250px
|caption         = 
|country         = Brazil
|dates           = February 14 – June 21
|num_teams       = 36
|winners       = [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians (SP)]]
|second       = [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio (RS)]]
|matches         = 69
|goals           = 166
|scoring_leader = [[Sávio]] (7)
|award          = 
|prev_season      = [[1994 Copa do Brasil|1994]]
|next_season      = [[1996 Copa do Brasil|1996]]
}}

The '''Copa do Brasil 1995''' is the 7th staging of the [[Copa do Brasil]].

The competition started on February 14, 1995, and concluded on June 21, 1995, with the second leg of the final, held at the [[Estádio Olímpico Monumental|Olímpico]] in [[Porto Alegre]], in which [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]] lifted the trophy for the first time after defeating [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]] 1–0.

==Preliminary round==

{{TwoLegStart}}
{{TwoLegResult|Sergipe-SE||1-4|[[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]-SP||1-1|0-3}}
{{TwoLegResult|Sousa-PB||0-2|[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]-RJ||0-1|0-1}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]]-RS||8-0|[[Figueirense FC|Figueirense]]-SC||5-0|3-0}}
{{TwoLegResult|Democrata-GV-MG||2-1|[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]]-GO||2-0|0-1}}
|}

==Knockout round==
{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n
| RD1= First Round
| RD2= Round of 16
| RD3= Quarterfinals
| RD4= Semifinals
| RD1-team01 = [[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico]]-PE
| RD1-team02 = [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]-SP
| RD1-score01-1 = 1
| RD1-score02-1 = 4
| RD1-score01-2 =
| RD1-score02-2 =
| RD1-team03 = Remo-PA
| RD1-team04 = Ferroviário-CE
| RD1-score03-1 = 1
| RD1-score04-1 = 1
| RD1-score03-2 = 3
| RD1-score04-2 = 1
| RD1-team05 = Desportiva-ES
| RD1-team06 = [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]-RS
| RD1-score05-1 = 0
| RD1-score06-1 = 1
| RD1-score05-2 = 1
| RD1-score06-2 = 2
| RD1-team07 = ABC-RN
| RD1-team08 = [[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]-SP
| RD1-score07-1 = 1
| RD1-score08-1 = 2
| RD1-score07-2 = 0
| RD1-score08-2 = 1
| RD1-team09 = [[Sociedade Esportiva do Gama|Gama]]-DF
| RD1-team10 = [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]-RJ
| RD1-score09-1 = 1
| RD1-score10-1 = 2
| RD1-score09-2 = 0
| RD1-score10-2 = 3
| RD1-team11 = Maranhão-MA
| RD1-team12 = Kaburé-TO
| RD1-score11-1 = 0
| RD1-score12-1 = 0
| RD1-score11-2 = 0
| RD1-score12-2 = 2
| RD1-team13 = CSA-AL
| RD1-team14 = [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]]-MG
| RD1-score13-1 = 1
| RD1-score14-1 = 2
| RD1-score13-2 = 0
| RD1-score14-2 = 4
| RD1-team15 = Volta Redonda-RJ ([[Penalty shootout (football)|p]])
| RD1-team16 = Bahia-BA
| RD1-score15-1 = 0
| RD1-score16-1 = 0
| RD1-score15-2 = 0 (6)
| RD1-score16-2 = 0 (7)
| RD2-team01 = [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]-SP
| RD2-team02 = Remo-PA
| RD2-score01-1 = 3
| RD2-score02-1 = 0
| RD2-score01-2 = 1
| RD2-score02-2 = 1
| RD2-team03 = [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]-RS ([[Away goals rule|a]])
| RD2-team04 = [[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]-SP
| RD2-score03-1 = 1
| RD2-score04-1 = 1
| RD2-score03-2 = 2
| RD2-score04-2 = 2
| RD2-team05 = [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]-RJ
| RD2-team06 = Kaburé-TO
| RD2-score05-1 = 1
| RD2-score06-1 = 0
| RD2-score05-2 = 8
| RD2-score06-2 = 0
| RD2-team07 = [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]]-MG ([[Away goals rule|a]])
| RD2-team08 = Bahia-BA
| RD2-score07-1 = 1
| RD2-score08-1 = 0
| RD2-score07-2 = 1
| RD2-score08-2 = 2
| RD3-team01 = [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]-SP
| RD3-team02 = [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]-RS
| RD3-score01-1 = 1
| RD3-score02-1 = 1
| RD3-score01-2 = 0
| RD3-score02-2 = 2
| RD3-team03 = [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]-RJ
| RD3-team04 = [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]]-MG
| RD3-score03-1 = 1
| RD3-score04-1 = 0
| RD3-score03-2 = 1
| RD3-score04-2 = 1
| RD4-team01 = [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]-RS
| RD4-team02 = [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]-RJ
| RD4-score01 =
| RD4-score02 =
}}

{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n
| RD1= First Round
| RD2= Round of 16
| RD3= Quarterfinals
| RD4= Semifinals
| RD1-team01 = [[Paraná Clube|Paraná]]-PR
| RD1-team02 = [[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]]-RS
| RD1-score01-1 = 1
| RD1-score02-1 = 0
| RD1-score01-2 = 1
| RD1-score02-2 = 0
| RD1-team03 = Pontaporanense-MT
| RD1-team04 = [[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]]-RS
| RD1-score03-1 = 0
| RD1-score04-1 = 2
| RD1-score03-2 = 0
| RD1-score04-2 = 5
| RD1-team05 = Operário-MT
| RD1-team06 = [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]-SP
| RD1-score05-1 = 1
| RD1-score06-1 = 1
| RD1-score05-2 = 0
| RD1-score06-2 = 4
| RD1-team07 = Rio Branco-AC
| RD1-team08 = Palmares-RO
| RD1-score07-1 = 2
| RD1-score08-1 = 0
| RD1-score07-2 = 2
| RD1-score08-2 = 2
| RD1-team09 = Democrata-GV-MG
| RD1-team10 = [[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]]-BA
| RD1-score09-1 = 3
| RD1-score10-1 = 2
| RD1-score09-2 = 0
| RD1-score10-2 = 2
| RD1-team11 = [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]
| RD1-team12 = [[Sport Club do Recife|Sport]]-PE
| RD1-score11-1 = 1
| RD1-score12-1 = 0
| RD1-score11-2 = 2
| RD1-score12-2 = 2
| RD1-team13 = Flamengo-PI
| RD1-team14 = [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]-RJ
| RD1-score13-1 = 1
| RD1-score14-1 = 2
| RD1-score13-2 = 1
| RD1-score14-2 = 4
| RD1-team15 = Cristal-AP
| RD1-team16 = Nacional-AM
| RD1-score15-1 = 1
| RD1-score16-1 = 1
| RD1-score15-2 = 0
| RD1-score16-2 = 1
| RD2-team01 = [[Paraná Clube|Paraná]]-PR
| RD2-team02 = [[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]]-RS
| RD2-score01-1 = 1
| RD2-score02-1 = 0
| RD2-score01-2 = 1
| RD2-score02-2 = 0
| RD2-team03 = [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]-SP
| RD2-team04 = Rio Branco-AC
| RD2-score03-1 = 3
| RD2-score04-1 = 0
| RD2-score03-2 = 2
| RD2-score04-2 = 0
| RD2-team05 = [[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]]-BA
| RD2-team06 = [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]
| RD2-score05-1 = 2
| RD2-score06-1 = 3
| RD2-score05-2 = 1
| RD2-score06-2 = 1
| RD2-team07 = [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]-RJ
| RD2-team08 = Nacional-AM
| RD2-score07-1 = 2
| RD2-score08-1 = 0
| RD2-score07-2 = 4
| RD2-score08-2 = 1
| RD3-team01 = [[Paraná Clube|Paraná]]-PR
| RD3-team02 = [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]-SP
| RD3-score01-1 = 0
| RD3-score02-1 = 0
| RD3-score01-2 = 1
| RD3-score02-2 = 2
| RD3-team03 = [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]
| RD3-team04 = [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]-RJ ([[Penalty shootout (football)|p]])
| RD3-score03-1 = 0
| RD3-score04-1 = 1
| RD3-score03-2 = 1 (1)
| RD3-score04-2 = 0 (4)
| RD4-team01 = [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]-SP
| RD4-team02 = [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]-RJ
| RD4-score01 =
| RD4-score02 =
}}

==Semifinals==

{{TwoLegStart}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]-RS ([[Away goals rule|a]])||2-2|[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]-RJ||1-2|1-0}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]-SP||6-0|[[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]-RJ||1-0|5-0}}
|}

==Finals==

{{TwoLegStart}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]-RS||1-3|[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]-SP||1-2|0-1}}
|}

==Champion==
{{winners||Copa do Brasil 1995|[[Image:Bandeira do Estado de São Paulo.svg|100px]]<br>[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]-SP|First}}

==External links==
* [https://web.archive.org/web/20080614094028/http://paginas.terra.com.br/esporte/rsssfbrasil/tables/cbr1995.htm Copa do Brasil 1995 at RSSSF]

{{Copa do Brasil Seasons}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Copa Do Brasil 1995}}
[[Category:Copa do Brasil seasons|1995]]
[[Category:1995 in Brazilian football]]
[[Category:1995 in domestic association football cups]]
